entity.label: Herodion
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Christian at Rome whom Paul salutes and calls his “kinsman” (Rom. 16:11).

nodes.label: Herodion
nodes.description: A Christian at Rome whom Paul salutes and calls his “kinsman” (Rom. 16:11).

verses.text: Salute Herodion my kinsman. Greet them that be of the household of Narcissus, which are in the Lord.
